qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist A stable-hit rewrite: prioritize deterministic single-match regex operations on current source shape

executionHints.description: Each development round uses one deterministic regex-patch that uniquely matches current preclass.c

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, explicit reset avoids stale invocation state

D1.description: Refactor confidence token ranking through a dedicated token matcher helper

D2.description: Route non-ip input label through explicit helper to stabilize match-layer default path

D3.description: Split route-change block decision into helper predicates for clearer branch control

D4.description: Refactor v6 unknown-hint branch into explicit predicate helper

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_v6_unknown_hint_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	if \(wc_preclass_is_unknown_class_value\(\*cls\)\)?
		wc_preclass_set_unknown_hint_tuple\(cls, rir, reason, confidence, "V6_NO_RIR_HINT"\);?
\}
